_instructions: Projects. Items with "featured": true render as large case studies; the rest render as repo cards filtered by "category".

projects.title: AI-Powered Customer Support Automation Platform
projects.description: End-to-end support automation, architected solo: a Flask/FastAPI service layer with RESTful endpoints, LLM-driven intent classification, a FAISS-backed RAG layer over the support knowledge base, a PostgreSQL + SQLAlchemy SQL-generation engine, and a human-escalation fallback for low-confidence cases.

projects.title: Predictive Campaign Intelligence System
projects.description: An interpretable marketing-prediction system: EDA across 45,000 customer records, feature engineering from transactional signals, and an XGBoost + Random Forest ensemble with a SHAP layer that made predictions legible to non-technical stakeholders. Adopted by marketing leadership.

projects.title: rag-chatbot
projects.description: A production-style RAG chatbot: FastAPI backend, Chroma vector store, and local LLM inference via llama.cpp, with hierarchical context management and a real-time UI.

projects.title: multi-agentic-rag
projects.description: Multi-agent RAG — coordinated agents that plan, retrieve, and synthesize over a knowledge base to handle complex, multi-step queries.

projects.title: multimodal-live-rag-voice
projects.description: Voice-enabled multimodal RAG — live audio in, retrieved-and-grounded answers out, combining speech with retrieval.

projects.title: langchain-rag-document-understanding
projects.description: LangChain RAG over PDFs: chunking, SentenceTransformer + FAISS retrieval, and an OpenAI-powered QA pipeline for document understanding, summarization, and report generation.

projects.title: rag-from-scratch
projects.description: RAG built from the ground up across 10 progressive modules — embeddings, vector storage, hybrid search, multi-query retrieval, and query rewriting, with zero cloud dependencies.

projects.title: Conversa — Real-Time Chat
projects.description: A full-stack MERN chat app: Socket.IO real-time messaging, JWT + email/OTP auth, a per-user Google Gemini AI bot, AWS S3 media, read receipts and replies — Dockerized.

projects.title: mern-ecommerce
projects.description: Full-stack MERN commerce platform with multi-role buyers, sellers, and admins, Redux state management, and a Vercel deployment.

projects.title: Marketing-Analytics-for-E-Commerce
projects.description: Marketing analytics for e-commerce — turning transactional signals into campaign performance and conversion insight.
